headline: Pentair Hosts 2026 Investor Day
summary: LONDON, March 04, 2026--Pentair plc (NYSE: PNR), a leader in helping the world sustainably move, improve, and enjoy water, life’s most essential resource, will host an Investor Day in New York City today beginning at 9:30 a.m. ET, as previously announced. The event is expected to conclude at approximately 12 p.m. ET.
